TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Tou naunamou a-koumea ta Sou, ka æ'ïa-qua ki Alid ta Sou, ka Alid ta Sou [kanna].
Tou naunamou akoumea ta Sou, ka æ'ïa-qua ki Alid ta Sou, ka Alid ta Sou [kanna].
S.TRANSL: In den beginne was het Woort ende het Woort was hy Godt ende het Woort was Godt.
In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
太初有道，道與上帝同在，道就是上帝。

S.FORM: Ta atta æ'ïa-qua ki Alid tou naunamou.
Ta atta æ'ïa-qua ki Alid tou naunamou.
S.TRANSL: Dit was in den beginne hy Godt.
The same was in the beginning with God.
這道太初與上帝同在。

S.FORM: Ni-pei-ymd-en ta mamang ki anna, ka tou äoussi ki an na, assi ni-pei-ring-ei ta sa-sasat ka mamang, ka ni-pei-ring-ei-ra.
Ni-pei-ymd-en ta mamang ki anna, ka tou äoussi ki an na, assi ni-pei-ring-ei ta sasasat ka mamang, ka ni-pei-ring-ei-ra.
S.TRANSL: Alle dingen zijn door het selbe gemaeckt ende sonder het selbe en is geen Dingh gemaeckt Dat gemaeckt is.
All things were made by him; and without him was not any thing made that was made.
萬物是藉着他造的；凡被造的，沒有一樣不是藉着他造的。

S.FORM: Æ'ïa-qua tou anna ta keuǣg-han, ka keuǣg-han [kanna] ta ræmæh ki ka'euloung.
Æ'ïa-qua tou anna ta keuǣg-han, ka keuǣg-han [kanna] ta ræmæh ki ka'euloung.
S.TRANSL: In het selbe was het lebel ende het leben was het licht der menschen.
In him was life; and the life was the light of men.
生命在他裏頭，這生命就是人的光。

S.FORM: Ka mæræmæh ta ræmæh tou karumdum-an, ka assi ni-mi balei ta karumdum-an ki anna.
Ka mæræmæh ta ræmæh tou karumdum-an, ka assi ni-mi balei ta karumdum-an ki anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende het licht schijnt in de duysternisse ende de duysternisse en heeft het selbe niet begrepen.
And the light shineth in darkness; and the darkness comprehended it not.
光照在黑暗裏，黑暗卻不接受光。

S.FORM: Ni-akoumea ta tau, ka na padadingi ki Alid, ka nanang tyn ta ti Joannes.
Ni-akoumea ta tau, ka na padadingi ki Alid, ka nanang tyn ta ti Joannes.
S.TRANSL: Daer was een Mensche ban Godt gesonden wiens name was Joannes.
There was a man sent from God, whose name was John.
有一個人，是從上帝那裏差來的，名叫約翰。

S.FORM: Teni k'atta ta ni-iroua tou pattæ'i-hail-en, ka pattæ'i-heil-eich tyn ta ræmæh, alei ka tna-ymd-ah tna-msing aley tyni-æn.
Teni k'atta ta ni-iroua tou pattæ'i-hail-en, ka pattæ'i-heil-eich tyn ta ræmæh, alei ka tna-ymd-ah tna-msing aley tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Dese quam tot het getuygenisse om ban Het licht te getuygen op Dat sy alle door hem gelooden souden.
The same came for a witness, to bear witness of the Light, that all men through him might believe.
這人來，為要作見證，就是為光作見證，叫眾人因他可以信。

S.FORM: Assi ræmæh ta teni, ra dyk alei ki pattæ'i-hail-eih tyn ki ræmæh-da.
Assi ræmæh ta teni, ra dyk alei ki pattæ'i-hail-eih tyn ki ræmæh-da.
S.TRANSL: Hy en was het licht niet, maer [was gefonden] op dat hy ban Het licht getuygen soude
He was not that Light, but was sent to bear witness of that Light.
他不是那光，乃是要為光作見證。

S.FORM: [Teni kanna] ta ræmæh ka d'lligh, ka mæræmæh ym-mud ki ka'eulong ka iroua tou Næi.
[Teni kanna] ta ræmæh ka d'lligh, ka mæræmæh ym-mud ki ka'eulong ka iroua tou Næi.
S.TRANSL: [Dit] [Dit] was het waerachtige licht het welcke berlicht een yegelick mensche komende in de werelt
That was the true Light, which lighteth every man that cometh into the world.
那光是真光，照亮一切生在世上的人。

S.FORM: A'ïa-qua tou Næi ta teni, ka ni-pei-ringei tyn ta Næi: ka assi ni-kmalang tyni-æn ta Næy-ra.
A'ïa-qua tou Næi ta teni, ka ni-pei-ringei tyn ta Næi: ka assi ni-kmalang tyni-æn ta Næy-ra.
S.TRANSL: Hy was in De werelt ende De Werelt is door hem gemaeckt : ende De werelt en heeft hem niet gekent.
He was in the world, and the world was made by him, and the world knew him not.
他在世界，世界也是藉着他造的，世界卻不認識他。

S.FORM: Ni-mou-qua ki â-teni, ka assi ni-a-balei [matta-rarijh] tyni-æn ta â-teni.
Ni-mou-qua ki â-teni, ka assi ni-a-balei [matta-rarijh] tyni-æn ta â-teni.
S.TRANSL: Hy is gekomen tot Het sijne ende De sijne en hebben hem niet aengenomen. '
He came unto his own, and his own received him not.
他到自己的地方來，自己的人倒不接待他。

S.FORM: Papynnapynnà ta ni-a-balei [mattara rijh] tyni-æn, ni-phæn tyn ta ka'ilhg-an keuh-ala-lak ki Alid, neini-æn ka tna-m'sing ki nanang tyn-da.
Papynnapynnà ta ni-a-balei [mattara rijh] tyni-æn, ni-phæn tyn ta ka'ilhg-an keuh-ala-lak ki Alid, neini-æn ka tna-m'sing ki nanang tyn-da.
S.TRANSL: Waer so bele hem aengenomen hebben Dien Heeft hy macht gegeben kinderen Gods te worden [namelijk] de in sijnen name gelooben
But as many as received him, to them gave he power to become the sons of God, even to them that believe on his name:
凡接待他的，就是信他名的人，他就賜他們權柄作上帝的兒女。

S.FORM: Ka assi ni-pou-alak-kan na 'æmah, assi na kamoei-in ki vât, assi na kamoei-in ki pæeæh, ra na Alid-appa.
Ka assi ni-pou-alak-kan na 'æmah, assi na kamoei-in ki vât, assi na kamoei-in ki pæeæh, ra na Alid-appa.
S.TRANSL: Welcke niet uyt den bloede noch uyt Den wille Des bleeschs noch uyt den wille des mans maer uyt Godt geboren zijn.
Which were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man, but of God.
這等人不是從血氣生的，不是從情慾生的，也不是從人意生的，乃是從上帝生的。

S.FORM: Ka ni-kæuh-bât ta Sou, ka ni-itoukaqua ymyt-æn, ( ka ni-k'ytta-niæn ta keirangh-en tyn, ta kei-rang-an ki kidi mama ki Pei-sat-en ki Rama-râ ) mat'-moei ki kanadap-en, kamam-sing-an appa.
Ka ni-kæuh-bât ta Sou, ka ni-itoukaqua ymyt-æn, ( ka ni-k'ytta-niæn ta keirangh-en tyn, ta kei-rang-an ki kidi mama ki Pei-sat-en ki Rama-râ ) mat'-moei ki kanadap-en, kamam-sing-an appa.
S.TRANSL: Ende het Woordt is bleesch geworden ende heeft onder ons gewoont (ende wy hebben sijne heerlijckheyt aenschout eene heerlickeyt als Des eenigh-geboren ban Den Dader ) bol ban genade ende waerheyt.
And the Word was made flesh, and dwelt among us, (and we beheld his glory, the glory as of the only begotten of the Father,) full of grace and truth.
道成了肉身，住在我們中間，充充滿滿地有恩典有真理。我們也見過他的榮光，正是父獨生子的榮光。

S.FORM: Mattæ'i-hail ta ti Joannestyni-æn, ka ni-pakou-lang'h-gen tyn, koumma, Teni ta ti atta ka ni-qua-au, Teni ka si-æ'uh jau-an, ta ni-kæu'h-ourou jau-an, alei ka tou ourou jau-an ako-um-eata teni.
Mattæ'i-hail ta ti Joannestyni-æn, ka ni-pakou-lang'h-gen tyn, koumma, Teni ta ti atta ka ni-qua-au, Teni ka si-æ'uh jau-an, ta ni-kæu'h-ourou jau-an, alei ka tou ourou jau-an ako-um-eata teni.
S.TRANSL: Joannes getuyght ban hem ef heeft geroepen seggende : Dese was â€™t ban welcken ick seyde Die namy komt is boor my geworden want hy waseer Dan ick.
John bare witness of him, and cried, saying, This was he of whom I spake, He that cometh after me is preferred before me: for he was before me.
約翰為他作見證，喊着說：「這就是我曾說：『那在我以後來的，反成了在我以前的，因他本來在我以前。』」

S.FORM: Ka tou kat moei-en tyn ni-a-ymd-an-eta mara ta kanadap-en, ka kmah-tounoutou-noun ki kanadap-en-da.
Ka tou kat moei-en tyn ni-a-ymd-an-eta mara ta kanadap-en, ka kmah-tounoutou-noun ki kanadap-en-da.
S.TRANSL: EnEnde unt sijne bolheyt hebben wy alle ontfangen oock genade boor genade.
And of his fulness have all we received, and grace for grace.
從他豐滿的恩典裏，我們都領受了，而且恩上加恩。

S.FORM: Alei ka na pæp'ǣ ti Mo-ses ta Tatouhko, râ kanadap-en ta kamamsing-an appa na pa-va-ftæu [ta anna] ti Jesus Christus.
Alei ka na pæp'ǣ ti Moses ta Tatouhko, râ kanadap-en ta kamamsing-an appa na pa-va-ftæu [ta anna] ti Jesus Christus.
S.TRANSL: Want de Wet is door Mosem gegeben De genade ende waerheyt is door Jesum Christum geworden.
For the law was given by Moses, but grace and truth came by Jesus Christ.
律法本是藉着摩西傳的；恩典和真理都是由耶穌基督來的。

S.FORM: Myh ka qua assi ni-kmyt-ta ta ti mamang ki Alid ra: Alak ka pei-sât-en ka i tou-quia tou ǣ-i-va ki Rama, teni ta ni-tmæuæuh poupænæh [ymyt-æn].
Myh ka qua assi ni-kmytta ta ti mamang ki Alid ra: Alak ka pei-sât-en ka i tou-quia tou ǣ-i-va ki Rama, teni ta ni-tmæuæuh poupænæh [ymyt-æn].
S.TRANSL: Niemant en Heeft oyt Godt gesien : De eenighgeboren Sone die in Den schoot Des Daders is die heeft [hemons] berkaert
No man hath seen God at any time, the only begotten Son, which is in the bosom of the Father, he hath declared him.
從來沒有人看見上帝，只有在父懷裏的獨生子將他表明出來。 （太3‧1－12；可1‧1－8；路3‧1－18）

S.FORM: Ka atta ta patt'æi-hail-en ti Joannes, rou padingi-en ki Joden makka-Jerusalem ta Tama-Pichik ki Leviten-appa pa-taligh tyni-æn; Timang kow?
Ka atta ta patt'æi-hail-en ti Joannes, rou padingi-en ki Joden makka-Jerusalem ta Tama-Pichik ki Leviten-appa pa-taligh tyni-æn; Timang kow?
S.TRANSL: Ende dit is Het getuy genisse Joannis doe De JoDen [eenige] Priesters ende Lebiten affonden nan Jerusalem op Dat hem souDen bragen : Wie zijt ghy-
And this is the record of John, when the Jews sent priests and Levites from Jerusalem to ask him, Who art thou?
約翰所作的見證記在下面：猶太人從耶路撒冷差祭司和利未人到約翰那裏，問他說：「你是誰？」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mattæ'idungdung ta teni, ka assi ni-rmau; ka ni-dmungdung mattæ'i-kma-hina, Assi ti jau ta ti Christus.
Ka ni-mattæ'idungdung ta teni, ka assi ni-rmau; ka ni-dmungdung mattæ'i-kma-hina, Assi ti jau ta ti Christus.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy beleedt ende en loochende het niet ende beleedt Ick en ben De Christud niet.
And he confessed, and denied not; but confessed, I am not the Christ.
他就明說，並不隱瞞，明說：「我不是基督。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-teitaligh nein tyni-æn, na mang-lava? ti Elias kow kaua? ka ni-koumma ta teni, assi-koh [ti anna]: Tama-Mattæ'i-Tan kow kaua? ka ni-matt'æi-vli ta teni, Assi.
Ka ni-teitaligh nein tyni-æn, na mang-lava? ti Elias kow kaua? ka ni-koumma ta teni, assi-koh [ti anna]: Tama-Mattæ'i-Tan kow kaua? ka ni-matt'æi-vli ta teni, Assi.
S.TRANSL: Ende sy braeghden hem : Wat Dan : Zijt ghy Elias: Ende hy seyde Ick en ben [die] niet : Zijt ghy de Propheet : ende hy antwoorde Neen.
And they asked him, What then? Art thou Elias? And he saith, I am not. Art thou that prophet? And he answered, No.
他們又問他說：「這樣，你是誰呢？是以利亞嗎？」他說：「我不是。」「是那先知嗎？」他回答說：「不是。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta neni tyni-æn: Timang kow-ra? alei ka pattæ'i-vli-en-mi-æn ki sou neini-æn, ka ni-madingi ymiæn-æn, mang koumma kow ymhou-an mamado?
Anna ta ni-k'ma ta neni tyni-æn: Timang kow-ra? alei ka pattæ'i-vli-en-mi-æn ki sou neini-æn, ka ni-madingi ymiæn-æn, mang koumma kow ymhou-an mamado?
S.TRANSL: Sy seyden Dan, tot hem : Wie zijt ghy : op Dat wy antwoorde geben mogen Den genen die ons gesonden hebben Wat seght ghy ban u selben:
Then said they unto him, Who art thou? that we may give an answer to them that sent us. What sayest thou of thyself?
於是他們說：「你到底是誰，叫我們好回覆差我們來的人。你自己說，你是誰？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma: tijau ta yngau kiMakou-langæh tou poulæpou-læh-da:peitiktik-au pakahapou-hap ta darang ki M E I R A N G, mama ki ni pa-sou sou-en ti Esaïas ka na Mattæ'i-Tan.
Ni-k'ma: tijau ta yngau kiMakou-langæh tou poulæpou-læh-da:peitiktik-au pakahapou-hap ta darang ki M E I R A N G, mama ki ni pa-sou sou-en ti Esaïas ka na Mattæ'i-Tan.
S.TRANSL: Ny Ny seyde : Ick ben De stemme des roependen in De Woestijne : Maeckt Den wegh Des Neeren recht geliick Esaias De propheet gesproken heeft.
He said, I am the voice of one crying in the wilderness, Make straight the way of the Lord, as said the prophet Esaias.
他說：「我就是那在曠野有人聲喊着說：『修直主的道路』，正如先知以賽亞所說的。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-padingi-en na Fariseen ta neni.
Ka ni-padingi-en na Fariseen ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Ende de afgesondene waren uyt Den Phariseen.
And they which were sent were of the Pharisees.
那些人是法利賽人差來的；

S.FORM: Ka ni-tmaligh tyni-æn, ka ni kma tyni-æn ta neni: Ka oumang ka mæulough-kow, rou assi kow ti Christus, assi ti Elias, assi ki Tama-Mattǣ'i-Tan-da?
Ka ni-tmaligh tyni-æn, ka ni kma tyni-æn ta neni: Ka oumang ka mæulough-kow, rou assi kow ti Christus, assi ti Elias, assi ki Tama-Mattǣ'i-Tan-da?
S.TRANSL: Ende sy braeghden hem ende spraken tot hem: Waerom doopt ghy dan soo ghy De Christus niet en zijt noch Elias noch De Propheet:
And they asked him, and said unto him, Why baptizest thou then, if thou be not that Christ, nor Elias, neither that prophet?
他們就問他說：「你既不是基督，不是以利亞，也不是那先知，為甚麼施洗呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vli neini-æn ta ti Joannes, k'ma; Ti jau ta mæu-lough ki raloum, ra mou-ryppat myttouhko ymoumi-æn, ka assi-moumi kalang-in da.
Ni-mattæ'i-vli neini-æn ta ti Joannes, k'ma; Ti jau ta mæu-lough ki raloum, ra mou-ryppat myttouhko ymoumi-æn, ka assi-moumi kalang-in da.
S.TRANSL: Joannes antwoorde Haer seggende ; Ick doope met water maer hy staet midden onder u-lieden Dien ghy niet en kent
John answered them, saying, I baptize with water: but there standeth one among you, whom ye know not;
約翰回答說：「我是用水施洗，但有一位站在你們中間，是你們不認識的，

S.FORM: Teni ta ti anna ka si-ǣ'üh ierroua jau-an, ka ni-kæu'-euro jau-an-da, ka assî koh tou kei-rang-en ki kidi, ki'æeu-sasyk't-an-ei-mau ta rapas ki tatapyl-tyn.
Teni ta ti anna ka si-ǣ'üh ierroua jau-an, ka ni-kæu'-euro jau-an-da, ka assî koh tou kei-rang-en ki kidi, ki'æeu-sasyk't-an-ei-mau ta rapas ki tatapyl-tyn.
S.TRANSL: Deselbe is't Die na my komt welcke boor my geworden is wien ick niet weerdigh en ben Dat ick fijnen schoen-riem soude ontbinden.
He it is, who coming after me is preferred before me, whose shoe's latchet I am not worthy to unloose.
就是那在我以後來的，我給他解鞋帶也不配。」

S.FORM: Ni-mamut ta atta tou Bethabara tou arouh ki Jordaen, ka mǣ-u-lou-u-loug ta ti Joannes tou hynna.
Ni-mamut ta atta tou Bethabara tou arouh ki Jordaen, ka mǣ-u-lou-u-loug ta ti Joannes tou hynna.
S.TRANSL: Dese Dingen zijn geshdiedt in Bethabara ober Den Jordaen Daer Joannes Was doopende
These things were done in Bethabara beyond Jordan, where John was baptizing.
這是在約旦河外伯大尼，約翰施洗的地方作的見證。

S.FORM: Tou sasat-appa ki wæ'i ka tou ǣ'uh ni-k'yttan ti Joannes ta ti Jesus ka mouqua tyni-æn, ka kma; Kyttei ta patak ki i-ou-kò ki Alid, ka tama-eu-mia ki va-rau ki ymmud ki Næi-ra.
Tou sasat-appa ki wæ'i ka tou ǣ'uh ni-k'yttan ti Joannes ta ti Jesus ka mouqua tyni-æn, ka kma; Kyttei ta patak ki i-ou-kò ki Alid, ka tama-eu-mia ki varau ki ymmud ki Næi-ra.
S.TRANSL: Des anderen Daeghs sagh Joannes Jesum tot hem komende ende seyde; Siet het Lam Gods Dat De sonde Der Werelt wegh neemt
The next day John seeth Jesus coming unto him, and saith, Behold the Lamb of God, which taketh away the sin of the world.
次日，約翰看見耶穌來到他那裏，就說：「看哪，上帝的羔羊，除去世人罪孽的！

S.FORM: Teni ta ti atta ka ni-qua-au; si-ǣuh jau-an iroua ta paræh, ka ni-keuh-euro-jau-an, alei ka i-tou-ouro jau-an-da.
Teni ta ti atta ka ni-qua-au; si-ǣuh jau-an iroua ta paræh, ka ni-keuh-euro-jau-an, alei ka i-tou-ouro jau-an-da.
S.TRANSL: DeDese is het ban weltken ick geseght hebbe ; Na my komt een man die boor my geworden is want hy was eer dan ick.
This is he of whom I said, After me cometh a man which is preferred before me: for he was before me.
這就是我曾說：『有一位在我以後來、反成了在我以前的，因他本來在我以前。』

S.FORM: Ka assi koh ni-kmalang tyni-æn, râ tou pou-pænæ'-hen paka-vana tyni-æn ki Israel, alei ki anna iroua-to koh mǣuleuü-lugh ki raloum.
Ka assi koh ni-kmalang tyni-æn, râ tou pou-pænæ'-hen paka-vana tyni-æn ki Israel, alei ki anna iroua-to koh mǣuleuü-lugh ki raloum.
S.TRANSL: Ende ick en kende hem niet maer op Dat hy aen Israel sonde gheopenbaert worden daerom ben ik gekomen dopende met het water.
And I knew him not: but that he should be made manifest to Israel, therefore am I come baptizing with water.
我先前不認識他，如今我來用水施洗，為要叫他顯明給以色列人。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-matt'æi-hail ta ti Joannes, kma; ni-k'yttâ-'n-nau ta Joep-an ka mou-rarum makka-tounnoun, mama ki padæuh mǣyli itou-halap tyni-æn.
Ka ni-matt'æi-hail ta ti Joannes, kma; ni-k'yttâ-'n-nau ta Joep-an ka mou-rarum makka-tounnoun, mama ki padæuh mǣyli itou-halap tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende Joannes getuyghde seggende Ick hebbe den Geest gesien neder dalen uyt Den. Nemel geliick een duybe ende bleef op hem.
And John bare record, saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove, and it abode upon him.
約翰又作見證說：「我曾看見聖靈，彷彿鴿子從天降下，住在他的身上。

S.FORM: Ka assi-mau kalang-en ta teni, râ teni ka ni-madingi jau-an pæ-'ulough ki raloum, teni ta ni-k'ma jau-an, timang ta kytt'ei-'mhou 'tqua mou-rarim mou-ha-lap tyni-æn ta Joep-an, mæ-yli-appa mahgalap tyniæn , teni k'atta ta meulough ki Joep-an ka D'lligh Matiktik.

Ka assi-mau kalang-en ta teni, râ teni ka ni-madingi jau-an pæ-'ulough ki raloum, teni ta ni-k'ma jau-an, timang ta kytt'ei-'mhou 'tqua mou-rarim mou-ha-lap tyni-æn ta Joep-an, mæ-yli-appa mahgalap tyniæn , teni k'atta ta meulough ki Joep-an ka D'lligh Matiktik.
S.TRANSL: Ende ick en kende hem niet maer Die my gesonden Heeft om te doopen met water die hadde my geseght op welcken ghy sult den Geest sien nederdalen ende op hem blijben Dese is hef Die met Den Neyligen Geest doopt.

And I knew him not: but he that sent me to baptize with water, the same said unto me, Upon whom thou shalt see the Spirit descending, and remaining on him, the same is he which baptizeth with the Holy Ghost.
我先前不認識他，只是那差我來用水施洗的、對我說：『你看見聖靈降下來，住在誰的身上，誰就是用聖靈施洗的。』

S.FORM: Ka ti jau ta ni-kmytta, ka ni-mattæ'i-hail-koh, ka Alak ki Alid ta ti atta-ra.
Ka ti jau ta ni-kmytta, ka ni-mattæ'i-hail-koh, ka Alak ki Alid ta ti atta-ra.
S.TRANSL: Ende ick hebbe gesien ende hebbe getuyght Dat dese De Sone Godts is.
And I saw, and bare record that this is the Son of God.
我看見了，就證明這是上帝的兒子。」

S.FORM: Tou sasat-appa ki wæ'ï ka tou ǣ'ugh ni-mila mitouhko ta ti Joannes, ki ra rouha-appa ki Pahtatæutæu'-entyn.
Tou sasat-appa ki wæ'ï ka tou ǣ'ugh ni-mila mitouhko ta ti Joannes, ki ra rouha-appa ki Pahtatæutæu'-entyn.
S.TRANSL: Des anderen daeghs wederom stont Joannes ende twee uyt sijne Discipulen.
Again the next day after John stood, and two of his disciples;
再次日，約翰同兩個門徒站在那裏。

S.FORM: Ka rou ararau-en tyn ti Jesus-an ka mau-naunang , ni-k'ma ta teni: K'yttei ta patak ki i-ouko ki Alid.
Ka rou ararau-en tyn ti Jesus-an ka mau-naunang , ni-k'ma ta teni: K'yttei ta patak ki i-ouko ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Ende siende op Jesum [daer] wandelende seyde hy : Siet Het Lam Godts.
And looking upon Jesus as he walked, he saith, Behold the Lamb of God!
他見耶穌行走，就說：「看哪，這是上帝的羔羊！」

S.FORM: Ka ni-millingig ta rarou-ha ki Pahta tæutæu-en ki sou tyn, ka ni-mæ'-u-uh ti Jesus-an.
Ka ni-millingig ta rarouha ki Pahta tæutæu-en ki sou tyn, ka ni-mæ'-u-uh ti Jesus-an.
S.TRANSL: EnEnde die twee Discipulen hoorden hem [ dat] spreken ende sy botghden Jesum.
And the two disciples heard him speak, and they followed Jesus.
兩個門徒聽見他的話，就跟從了耶穌。

S.FORM: Irou ka mææu-veiryng ta tiJesus ka rou kmytta ki mæ-u-uh tyni-æn, ni-k'ma-neini-æn;
Irou ka mææu-veiryng ta tiJesus ka rou kmytta ki mæ-u-uh tyni-æn, ni-k'ma-neini-æn;
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus hem omkeerende ende siende haer bolgen seyde tot harr.
Then Jesus turned, and saw them following, and saith unto them, What seek ye? They said unto him, Rabbi, (which is to say, being interpreted, Master,) where dwellest thou?
耶穌轉過身來，看見他們跟着，就問他們說：「你們要甚麼？」他們說：「拉比，在哪裏住？」（拉比翻出來就是夫子。）

S.FORM: Kamang ta k'i'ym-'nou-mi?neni-ra ni-k'ma tyni æn, Rabbi (ka rou paha-biri-viri teni ki sou ki Mæhta-tæutæu uh) i-tou-kakouna kow?
Kamang ta k'i'ym-'nou-mi?neni-ra ni-k'ma tyni æn, Rabbi (ka rou paha-biri-viri teni ki sou ki Mæhta-tæutæu uh) i-tou-kakouna kow?
S.TRANSL: Wat soeckt ghy: ende sy seyden tot hem Rabbi (het welck is te seggen obergeset zijnde Meester) waer woont ghye :
They said unto him, Rabbi, (which is to say, being interpreted, Master,) where dwellest thou?
他們說：「拉比，在哪裏住？」（拉比翻出來就是夫子。）

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma neini-æn; 'Ou-qu'au,kmytta-ato. Ka ni-'ou-qua ka ni-kytt'an nein i-tou-kouna ta teni,ka ni-mi-sasaun tyni-æn sat ki wæ'i k'anna. Ka tou hivat-ato ki sat kyttiæn ki tæ'lei.
Ni-k'ma neini-æn; 'Ou-qu'au,kmytta-ato. Ka ni-'ou-qua ka ni-kytt'an nein i-tou-kouna ta teni,ka ni-mi-sasaun tyni-æn sat ki wæ'i k'anna. Ka tou hivat-ato ki sat kyttiæn ki tæ'lei.
S.TRANSL: Hy seyde tot haer Komt ende siet. Sy quamen ende sagenwaer hy woonde ende bleben dien dagh by hem. Ende het was outrent de tiende ure.
He saith unto them, Come and see. They came and saw where he dwelt, and abode with him that day: for it was about the tenth hour.
耶穌說：「你們來看。」他們就去看他在哪裏住，這一天便與他同住；那時約有申正了。

S.FORM: Ti Andreas ka tæ'i-a-para ti Simon Petrus ta saät ki rarouha [ki vouat] ka ni-millingigh ki at-ta ti Joannes-an, ka ni-mæ-u-ugh tyni-æn.
Ti Andreas ka tæ'i-a-para ti Simon Petrus ta saät ki rarouha [ki vouat] ka ni-millingigh ki at-ta ti Joannes-an, ka ni-mæ-u-ugh tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Andreas de broeder Simonis Petri was een van de twee die het van Joannes gehoort hadden ende hem gevolghet waren.
One of the two which heard John speak, and followed him, was Andrew, Simon Peter's brother.
聽見約翰的話跟從耶穌的那兩個人，一個是西門‧彼得的兄弟安得烈。

S.FORM: Ti atta tani-kma'-ouro kma-balei ki tæ'i-apara tyn ka d'lligh ka ti Simon, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn; Ni-tau-valei-nian ta ti Messias, att'-ato dou pahabiri-viri-en ki sou ta [ni-voulou ka] ti Christus.
Ti atta tani-kma'-ouro kma-balei ki tæ'i-apara tyn ka d'lligh ka ti Simon, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn; Ni-tau-valei-nian ta ti Messias, att'-ato dou pahabiri-viri-en ki sou ta [ni-voulou ka] ti Christus.
S.TRANSL: Dese bondt eerst sijnen broeder Simon ende sende tot hem : Wy hebben gebonden den Messiam het welch is obergeset zijnde Christus.
He first findeth his own brother Simon, and saith unto him, We have found the Messias, which is, being interpreted, the Christ.
他先找着自己的哥哥西門，對他說：「我們遇見彌賽亞了。」（彌賽亞翻出來就是基督。）

S.FORM: Kani-d'i lough tyn tyni-æn p'ou-qua ti Jesus-an. Ka tou ararau-en ti Jesus tyni-æn, ni-k'ma; Ti Simon kow, alak ti Jona: kapananang-eih-kow Cefas, ka paha-viri-biri-en ki sou ta [vah-tou, ka] ti Petrus.

Kani-d'i lough tyn tyni-æn p'ou-qua ti Jesus-an. Ka tou ararau-en ti Jesus tyni-æn, ni-k'ma; Ti Simon kow, alak ti Jona: kapananang-eih-kow Cefas, ka paha-viri-biri-en ki sou ta [vahtou, ka] ti Petrus.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy leyde hem tot Jesum. Ende Jesus hem aensiende seyde Ghy zijt Simon de sone Jona: ghy sult ghenaemt worden Ce: phas het welck obergeset word Petrus.
And he brought him to Jesus. And when Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone.
於是領他去見耶穌。耶穌看着他，說：「你是約翰的兒子西門，你要稱為磯法。」（磯法翻出來就是彼得。）

S.FORM: Tou ǣ'uhki wæ'i ni-ma-moei ta ti Jesus thabul mou-qua tou Galilæa, ka ni-kabalei tyn ta ti Filippus, ka ni-kma tyni-æn, Mæ-æu-uh-ha jau-an-da.
Tou ǣ'uhki wæ'i ni-ma-moei ta ti Jesus thabul mou-qua tou Galilæa, ka ni-kabalei tyn ta ti Filippus, ka ni-kma tyni-æn, Mæ-æu-uh-ha jau-an-da.
S.TRANSL: Des Des anderen daeghs wilde Jesus henen gaen na Galileen ende bondt Philippum ende seyde tot hem Dolght my.
The day following Jesus would go forth into Galilee, and findeth Philip, and saith unto him, Follow me.
又次日，耶穌想要往加利利去，遇見腓力，就對他說：「來跟從我吧。」

S.FORM: Ka makka Bethsaïda ta ti Filippus, na euma ti Andreas, ti Petrus.
Ka makka Bethsaïda ta ti Filippus, na euma ti Andreas, ti Petrus.
S.TRANSL: Philippus nu was ban Bethsaida uyt De sradt Andree ende Petri.
Now Philip was of Bethsaida, the city of Andrew and Peter.
這腓力是伯賽大人，和安得烈、彼得同城。

S.FORM: Ni-kmabalei ta ti Filip-pus ti Nathanaël-an, ka kma tyni-æn; Ni-tau-valei-niæn [ta tianna] ka ni-s'oulat-tin ti Moses tou Tatouhko, ki Tama-Mat-tæ'i-Tan-appa [atta] ta ti Jesus k'allak ti Josef, ka makka Nazareth.

Ni-kmabalei ta ti Filip-pus ti Nathanaël-an, ka kma tyni-æn; Ni-tau-valei-niæn [ta tianna] ka ni-s'oulat-tin ti Moses tou Tatouhko, ki Tama-Mat-tæ'i-Tan-appa [atta] ta ti Jesus k'allak ti Josef, ka makka Nazareth.
S.TRANSL: Philippus bont Nathanael ende seyde tot hem; Wy hebben [dien] gebonden ban welcken Moses in de Wet geschreben heeft ende de Propheten [namelick] Jesum den Sone Josephs ban Nazareth.
Philip findeth Nathanael, and saith unto him, We have found him, of whom Moses in the law, and the prophets, did write, Jesus of Nazareth, the son of Joseph.
腓力找着拿但業，對他說：「摩西在律法上所寫的和眾先知所記的那一位，我們遇見了，就是約瑟的兒子拿撒勒人耶穌。」

S.FORM: Kani-k'ma ta ti Nathanaël tyni-æn, gma'lpouh kaua yrroua ta mamamang ka mariang makka Nazareth? Ni-k'ma ta ti Filippus tyni-æn,'ou-qu-au, k'yttei.
Kani-k'ma ta ti Nathanaël tyni-æn, gma'lpouh kaua yrroua ta mamamang ka mariang makka Nazareth? Ni-k'ma ta ti Filippus tyni-æn,'ou-qu-au, k'yttei.
S.TRANSL: Ende Nathanael seyde tot hem kan uyt Nazareth yet goets zijn : Philippus seyde tot hem komt ende siet.
And Nathanael said unto him, Can there any good thing come out of Nazareth? Philip saith unto him, Come and see.
拿但業對他說：「拿撒勒還能出甚麼好的嗎？」腓力說：「你來看！」

S.FORM: Ka ni-kmytta ta ti Jesus ti Nathanaël-an ka mou-qua tyni-æn, ka ni-mattæ'i-mimia tyni-æn, K'yttei d'lligh ta Israëlyt, ka a'oussi ki si-vana van'-an tyni-æn.
Ka ni-kmytta ta ti Jesus ti Nathanaël-an ka mou-qua tyni-æn, ka ni-mattæ'i-mimia tyni-æn, K'yttei d'lligh ta Israëlyt, ka a'oussi ki si-vana van'-an tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Jesus sagh Nathanael tot hem komen ende seyde ban hem Siet waer lick een Israelijt welcken geen bedrogh en is.
Jesus saw Nathanael coming to him, and saith of him, Behold an Israelite indeed, in whom is no guile!
耶穌看見拿但業來，就指着他說：「看哪，這是個真以色列人，他心裏是沒有詭詐的。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Nathanaël tyni-æn, a'i kouanka kmalang kow jau-an? Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus kma tyni-æn, Si-ourou ki ni-ta-tam-en ymhou-an ti Filippus, dou itouqua-appa kow tou n'gara ki lakæuoung-in, ka k'ytt'-tan-au kow.

Ni-k'ma ta ti Nathanaël tyni-æn, a'i kouanka kmalang kow jau-an? Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus kma tyni-æn, Si-ourou ki ni-ta-tam-en ymhou-an ti Filippus, dou itouqua-appa kow tou n'gara ki lakæuoung-in, ka k'ytt'-tan-au kow.
S.TRANSL: Nathanel seyde tot hem Dan waer kent ghy my : Jesus antwoorde ende seyde tot hem Eer u Philippus riep daer ghy onder den bygeboom waert sagh ick u.
Nathanael saith unto him, Whence knowest thou me? Jesus answered and said unto him, Before that Philip called thee, when thou wast under the fig tree, I saw thee.
拿但業對耶穌說：「你從哪裏知道我呢？」耶穌回答說：「腓力還沒有招呼你，你在無花果樹底下，我就看見你了。」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Nathanaël ka kma tyni-æn, Rabbi, ym-hou ta Alak ki Alid, ymhou ta Meisasou ka si-bavau ki Israel.
Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Nathanaël ka kma tyni-æn, Rabbi, ymhou ta Alak ki Alid, ymhou ta Meisasou ka si-bavau ki Israel.
S.TRANSL: NaNathanel antwoorde ende sende tot hem Gabbi ghy zijt de Sone God ghy zijt de Koning Israels.
Nathanael answered and saith unto him, Rabbi, thou art the Son of God; thou art the King of Israel.
拿但業說：「拉比，你是上帝的兒子，你是以色列的王！」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus ni-kma tyni-æn; Alei ka ni-pa-sousou-en-nau ymhouan, Ni-kyt-ta-en-nau kow tou ngara ki lakæu oung-in, tna-msing-ato kow: kmytta-ah-kow ki masaoun irang ki atta.
Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus ni-kma tyni-æn; Alei ka ni-pa-sousou-en-nau ymhouan, Ni-kyt-ta-en-nau kow tou ngara ki lakæu oung-in, tna-msing-ato kow: kmytta-ah-kow ki masaoun irang ki atta.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoorde ende sende tot hem; Om dat ick u geseght hebbe Ick sagh u onder den bijgeboom soo ghelooft ghy: ghy sult grooter dingen sien dan dese.
Jesus answered and said unto him, Because I said unto thee, I saw thee under the fig tree, believest thou? thou shalt see greater things than these.
耶穌對他說：「因為我說『在無花果樹底下看見你』，你就信嗎？你將要看見比這更大的事」；

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma-tyni-æn, Mis-sing, missing koun-nau-ka mou-ra, na kidi hnyn kmyt-ah-kamou ki toun-noun ki vullum ka ni-lih touaf-vun ki Tama-Gnau-appa ki Alid ka mou-vavau, ka mou-rarim-appa mou-halap ki Alak ki ka'eu-loung.

Ka ni-k'ma-tyni-æn, Missing, missing koun-nau-ka mou-ra, na kidi hnyn kmyt-ah-kamou ki toun-noun ki vullum ka ni-lih touaf-vun ki Tama-Gnau-appa ki Alid ka mou-vavau, ka mou-rarim-appa mou-halap ki Alak ki ka'eu-loung.
S.TRANSL: Ende sende tot hem ; Doorwaer nordwaer seg ge ick u-lieden Dan nu aen sult ghy den Nemel sien geopent ende de Engelen Gods opklimmende ende nederdalende op den SOne des menschen.
And he saith unto him, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Hereafter ye shall see heaven open, and the angels of God ascending and descending upon the Son of man.
又說：「我實實在在地告訴你們，你們將要看見天開了，上帝的使者上去下來在人子身上。」
